title: Sterling EHS155 155mm Hasp and Staple
description: Product Description The Sterling EHS155 155mm Hasp & Staple is suitable for general use and ideally used in combination with a padlock. Ideal for securing garden sheds, tool boxes or for most low security applications. Corrosion resistant with a hardened steel staple and concealed screws. Manufactured to exacting standards. Sterling products are equal to the best in the market and are backed with guarantees of up to 10 years. Sterling is a brand of Burg-Wächter one of the largest manufacturers of security products in the world. Burg-Wächter has a proud heritage of over 120 years and are recognised for quality standards across our extensive range of locks, padlocks, safes, post boxes and access control solutions. Box Contains Hasp & Staple 155mm
